title: BEM-840 accept Claude diagnosis
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 16:01 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
responses=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper()
            if 'CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up and 'DECISION:' in up and ('BEM840' in p.name.upper() or 'BEM-840' in up):
                responses.append(str(p))
status='real_claude_response_accepted' if responses else 'real_claude_response_not_found'
next_action='prepare agreed protocol from Claude diagnosis; runtime blocker is expired CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN or missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' if responses else 'locate bem840 Claude response file before protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'real_response_files':responses,'operator_api_key_warning':'Do not paste API keys into chat or files. Use GitHub Secrets only. Prefer refreshing CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is paid and not selected by default.','next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_accept_claude_diagnosis.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_accept_claude_diagnosis.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Accept Claude Diagnosis | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. One step one action.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_accept_claude_diagnosis.json','governance/reports/bem840_accept_claude_diagnosis.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Accepted and recorded real Claude diagnosis if BEM-840 response exists, selected protocol preparation as next action, and warned that secrets must only go to GitHub Secrets')
"""
